sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id BIGINT, name VARCHAR, department VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'Sales'), (2, 'Bob', 'Sales'), (3, 'Charlie', 'HR'), (4, 'David', 'HR'), (5, 'Eve', 'IT');
SELECT name, department, dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY id) AS rank FROM employees;
CREATE TABLE projects (project_id BIGINT, project_name VARCHAR, department VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO projects (project_id, project_name, department) VALUES (1, 'Project Alpha', 'Sales'), (2, 'Project Beta', 'HR'), (3, 'Project Gamma', 'IT');
